title: Strawberry Shortcakes with White Chocolate Mousse
ingredients: 6 tablespoons chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F and line baking sheet with parchment.
In a food processor, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Add butter and pulse until coarse crumbs form.
Add ½ cup buttermilk and pulse until dough just comes together.
Turn dough onto floured surface and pat to ½-inch thickness.
Cut rounds and place on baking sheet.
Brush shortcakes with remaining buttermilk and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake until golden, about 15 minutes, then cool.
Toss strawberries with sugar and liqueur, then let stand until juices form.
For mousse, melt white chocolate with ⅔ cup cream over low heat.
Cool mousse mixture until slightly thickened.
Whip remaining cream to stiff peaks and fold into chocolate mixture.
Split shortcakes and assemble with strawberries and mousse.
